series_metadata.series_title: Cancellation of Registration of Deceased Elector
series_metadata.series_description: Includes Notice of Death of Registered Voter (R.C. 3503.21(A)(3)) and Notice of Cancellation of Voter Registration (R.C. 3503.21(F)) following receipt of notification of death of a registered elector. (SOS prescribed forms 255-C and 255-D)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain two (2) years, then may destroy., Paper: Shred
